query: SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.localidade, lv.volanteId, v.nome as volanteNome FROM lojas l LEFT JOIN loja_volante lv ON l.id = lv.lojaId LEFT JOIN volantes v ON lv.volanteId = v.id INNER JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON l.id = gl.lojaId INNER JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id INNER JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Amorim%' ORDER BY l.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.localidade, lv.volanteId, v.nome as volanteNome FROM lojas l LEFT JOIN loja_volante lv ON l.id = lv.lojaId LEFT JOIN volantes v ON lv.volanteId = v.id INNER JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON l.id = gl.lojaId INNER JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id INNER JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Amorim%' ORDER BY l.nome;
